metadata.title: Migrate auth to OAuth 2.0 — add tokens table, drop legacy password columns
metadata.body: This PR migrates user authentication from username/password to OAuth 2.0. A Flyway migration creates the oauth_tokens table and drops the legacy password_hash and password_salt columns. AuthController is updated to use the OAuth callback flow and UserService removes the now-obsolete password helpers.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+-- Create OAuth tokens table
+CREATE TABLE oauth_tokens (
+    id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
+    user_id       UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
+    provider      VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
+    access_token  TEXT NOT NULL,
+    refresh_token TEXT,
+    expires_at    TIMESTAMP,
+    created_at    TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
+);
+
+CREATE INDEX idx_oauth_tokens_user_id ON oauth_tokens(user_id);
+
+-- Remove legacy password columns (irreversible)
+ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN password_hash;
+ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN password_salt;
